message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing the account ending in 1184 with an amount due of 8,400. Before I can record your update, please verify your identity by confirming your full name.
Neha Verma. I’m currently unemployed, so I can’t pay anything right now.
Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship and are unable to pay this month. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Based on what you’ve already shared, the hardship path is the relevant next step. Current policy does not support an extension beyond 21 days, and I do not have exact approved reduced or plan terms available in this chat. If you want to keep this account active for review, the only live step I can record now is whether you expect any payment ability within the next 21 days. If not, I can note that you cannot commit at this time due to unemployment and close this discussion for now.
No, I don’t expect to be able to pay anything in the next 21 days either.

Under current policy, there is no extension beyond 21 days. You’ve stated you cannot commit to any payment within that window due to unemployment. I’m recording that position and ending this discussion for now.
